name: Mattix Family Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 cups combined cheddar and Monterey jack cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package instructions. Drain and rinse.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter over low heat. Add flour, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
3. Remove from heat and gradually add milk, stirring constantly until the mixture is warmed.
4. Gradually add cubed Velveeta cheese, stirring frequently until melted.
5. If the cheese sauce seems too thick, add a little more milk to achieve a creamy consistency.
6. Pour the cooked macaroni into a deep casserole dish and stir to coat evenly with the cheese sauce.
7. Sprinkle shredded cheddar and Monterey jack cheese on top.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 400°F until the cheese is bubbly and slightly browned.
